Kluster, SothebyвҖҷs Miami Shake-Up** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon roundup of PuckвҖҷs best new reporting.     Today, we lead with **Dylan Byers** вҖҷ holiday cocktail of media business intel: **Will Lewis** and **Jeff Bezos** вҖҷs shortlist for *Washington Post* executive editor, the real story of **Rashida Jones** вҖҷs impending exit from MSNBC, the latest SpinCo spin from 30 Rock, and more.     Plus, below the fold: **Bill Cohan** wonders whether a reverse merger with **Elon** вҖҷs X could save Truth Social from its post-election slump. **Rachel Strugatz** reminisces about a year to forget for beauty industry dealmakers. **John Heilemann** chats with a pair of F.B.I. veteransвҖ” **Frank Figliuzzi** and **Andrew Weissmann** вҖ”about **Kash Patel** and the state of the bureau as Trump II looms. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Marion Maneker** joins **Peter Hamby** to preview Art Basel Miami, which kicks off this week, and the chatter surrounding potential layoffs at SothebyвҖҷs. | |  | | [Rashida Revisionism & WillвҖҷs Editor-Hunting](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUbUdrdjA4SnpUNjZJdDFFazJKcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbXNuYmMtZXhpdC1zdHJhdGVnaWVzLXdhc2hpbmd0b24tcG9zdC1uZXctZXhlY3V0aXZlLWVkaXRvci8_) | | DYLAN BYERS | | News and notes on the yuletide fixations of legacy media and its stalwarts as corporate holiday party season beckons: Rashida JonesвҖҷ impending MSNBC exit, SpinCo spin, and the denouement of the Washington Post (first newsroom!) executive editor sweepstakes. | | | |  | | --- | | **A MESSAGE FROM INSTAGRAM** | |  | | **Instagram Teen Accounts: automatic protections for teens**     Parents want safer online experiences for their teens. That's why Instagram is introducing Teen Accounts, with automatic protections for who can contact teens and the content they can see.     A key factor: Only parents can approve safety setting changes for teens under 16.   [**Learn more**](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUbUdrdjA4SnpUNjZJdDFFazJKcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYW1pbHljZW50ZXIubWV0YS5jb20vaW5zdGFncmFtLXNhZmV0eS8_) | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [TrumpвҖҷs Pre-Inaugural Stock Slump](https://email.puck.) | | WILLIAM D. COHAN | | The value of the president-electвҖҷs media company, which is on track to lose an incredible $363 million this year, has bizarrely skyrocketed before the election and is trading at an absurd 2,770x revenue. Will Elon get his taste via a reverse merger? | |  | | [Beauty M&AвҖҷs Lost Year](https://email.puck.) | | RACHEL STRUGATZ | | Despite rose-tinted expectations, itвҖҷs shaping up to be a barren year for beauty business hookups, as sellers and buyers diverge over valuations and strategic investors pull back. | |  | | [The F.B.I.вҖҷs Kash Conundrum](https://email.puck.) | | JOHN HEILEMANN | | With Trump bent on revenge and having appointed the ideal henchman to carry it out, F.B.I. honchos are dusting off their rГ©sumГ©s while field officers cross their fingers. Two bureau veteransвҖ”Frank Figliuzzi and Andrew WeissmannвҖ”explain how worried we should really be. | | | |  | | --- | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Inside Art Basel & SothebyвҖҷs Latest Shake-Up](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & MARION MANEKER | | Marion Maneker joins Peter to share an inside look at Art Basel, which kicked off this week in Miami, and previews the notable shows and fairs that are likely to make waves at South Beach. Then he digs into the latest buzz surrounding potential layoffs at SothebyвҖҷs and how owner Patrick Drahi is aiming to streamline the business. | | |  | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUbUdrdjA4SnpUNjZJdDFFazJKcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
